name: Stir Fry (Dxdg05a)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Vegetable - such as bok cho
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a pan until very hot, add oil, and stir fry the garlic until fragrant.
2. Add vegetables that have been cut to uniform size and stir fry for 1 minute.
3. Sprinkle with a pinch of sugar and 2 tablespoons water. Cover and steam for 1 minute. Spinach and bok cho will be tender crisp, while broccoli and pea pods may need an additional 30-60 seconds to cook through.
